pageContext.name: PlayStation White Alarm Clock
pageContext.description: Make sure you are on time for whatever adventure awaits with this alarm clock that has been designed with details that stay true to the famous PlayStation 4 DualShock controller. The large, reverse LCD display makes it easy to read the time even with bleary eyes when you first wake-up.  Measuring 16cm (6.2 inches) wide, any collector of authentic PlayStation merchandise will welcome this addition to their collection of memorabilia. Plus, they will be able to get a good night's sleep knowing they will be up in time and fully refreshed for another day of gaming.  Supplied in a printed gift box this is the perfect present for any PlayStation fan and gamers of all ages. Powered by USB (cable included) it will look great in any bedroom, gaming den, or man cave.
